'''Nerf tenderloin''' was a portion of meat that was cut from the middle of a [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]]. It was usually marinated and served as an elegant and expensive [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] choice.

==Appearances==
*{{TORweb|url=info/news/blog/20150403|text="Regrets"|int=Regrets}}
